# `api.commodity_maps.get`

> `GET /commodity-map/{id}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.commodity_maps.get(map_id: str) -> CommodityMap
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab commodity_maps get <map_id>
```

GET /commodity-map/{id}

## Response

Returns `CommodityMap`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Map ID |
| `customName` | `Optional[str]` | no | Custom commodity name |
| `commodityId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Linked commodity ID |
